title: Add the rating column to the chart view
excerpt: Would be very nice to add the rating columns to the charts view. Simple as that. Our company uses monday forms to send out surveys and people can add a ranking as an asnwer. It would be useful to have thoses ranking sort…

posts.author: rosecote (Rosemarie Cote)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be very nice to add the rating columns to the charts view. Simple as that. Our company uses monday forms to send out surveys and people can add a ranking as an asnwer. It would be useful to have thoses ranking sorted out in a chart for data anlysis.

Thanks !
